---
id: reject-2
title: "Reject an approval request"
description: "Records a rejection. Cancels all remaining PENDING and BLOCKED steps in the chain. Comment is required."

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Reject an approval request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/approvals/{id}/reject"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Records a rejection. Cancels all remaining PENDING and BLOCKED steps in the chain. Comment is required.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
